channel.title: Saas on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Saas on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: Signals: Week 10, 2026
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: The efficiency paradox of AI, why ‘plausible’ code isn’t engineered code, and the pragmatic path to the Agentic Economy through virtual cards.

item.title: Signals: Week 07, 2026
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Decentralizing the ‘how’ while centralizing the ‘why’—navigating governance and complexity in the age of AI agents.

item.title: Signals: Week 06, 2026
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Escaping the rent-seeking trap of tech platforms: why the future of the agentic economy belongs to those who own the protocols.

item.title: Sentro
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: UBX-backed e-commerce platform that empowers over 30,000 Filipino merchants to build their own online stores for free, featuring integrated payments, logistics, and financing.

item.title: ERPx
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A SaaS based, low cost ERP for tech’ing up micro and small businesses, Collecting transaction data for potential credit and digitizing payments.
